basics.name: Joseph Demarest
basics.label: Multidisciplinary Engineer
basics.summary: A highly versatile engineer with expertise in computer science, electrical engineering, and additive manufacturing.

work.name: Vyir, Inc.
work.summary: Designed and implemented a state-of-the-art beam profiler application for precisely measured laser characteristics, including the GUI, backend, and hardware.

work.name: Rite Aid
work.summary: Oversaw daily store operations, including staff scheduling, inventory management, and financial reporting, while also resolving escalated customer issues with diplomacy.
